basic_details.job_title: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Health Mission Tamil Nadu (NHM Tamil Nadu)
basic_details.short_information: The National Health Mission – Tamil Nadu (NHM Tamil Nadu) has officially announced the Consultant Information Technology Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Eligible candidates up to 45 years of age who hold a Graduate degree in Engineering (IT/ CS/ SE) or equivalent with MCA/ M.Tech (CS/ IT), or a Postgraduate degree in Public Health, Health Informatics, Health Systems, or Health Management can submit their online applications on or before 23 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Engineering (IT/CS/SE) or equivalent with MCA/M.Tech (CS/IT) or Postgraduate in Public Health/Health Informatics/Health Systems/Health Management.
qualification.details: Consultant – Information Technology: Graduate in Engineering (Information Technology / Computer Science / Software Engineering) or equivalent with Master of Computer Applications (MCA) / M.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Health Informatics / Health Systems / Health Management. Minimum 3 years of post-qualification experience in: IT systems administration, Network management, Application development or support, Digital platforms or information systems management.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM Tamil Nadu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NHM Tamil Nadu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Information Technology Job 2026 Notification PDF

NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant – Information Technology: Graduate in Engineering (Information Technology / Computer Science / Software Engineering) or equivalent with Master of Computer Applications (MCA) / M.Tech in Computer Science / Information Technology / Postgraduate qualification in Public Health / Health Informatics / Health Systems / Health Management. Minimum 3 years of post-qualification experience in: IT systems administration, Network management, Application development or support, Digital platforms or information systems management.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHM Tamil Nadu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Tamil Nadu Consultant – Information Technology recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Consultant – Information Technology post is 23rd July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant – Information Technology post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate degree in Engineering (IT/CS/SE) or equivalent with MCA/M.Tech (CS/IT) or a Postgraduate degree in Public Health/Health Informatics/Health Systems/Health Management.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant – Information Technology position is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultant – Information Technology role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 40,000 to Rs. 60,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant – Information Technology post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Consultant – Information Technology position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job opportunity.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum experience required for the Consultant – Information Technology post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of post-qualification experience in IT systems administration, network management, application development or support, digital platforms, or information systems management is required.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Chennai, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies recruitment for Tamil Nadu. Candidates should check the official notification for any state-specific eligibility criteria.
